name: Pride Academy Trnsprtn LLC
districts_or_customers: Indianapolis-area; likely IPS / charter / Pride Academy daycare network; FMCSA-registered motor carrier (USDOT 3832756, MC 1390995)
recent_news: Active small carrier with operating website (prideacademytransportationllc.com); FMCSA shows ~4 power units / 4 drivers (property authority).
fit_notes: Very small (sub-$2M, ~4 buses) Indianapolis operator; too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own but could be a bolt-on if Summit builds an Indianapolis cluster; would need to confirm school-bus (vs. property) service mix.

name: Mini School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Royal Palm Beach / Palm Beach County area; not confirmed on Palm Beach County School District approved vendor list in public sources
recent_news: No web presence, news, or M&A activity located; appears to be a very small home-based operation (registered to a residential address at 360 Sandpiper Ave).
fit_notes: Address is residential, no website, no traceable district contracts - looks like a very thin/home-based operation. Likely too small and operationally informal to be an attractive Summit tuck-in; would require direct outreach to verify it is an active school-bus contractor at all.

name: KIK School Bus Svc Corp
districts_or_customers: Broward / Miami-Dade area; appears on Miami-Dade County Public Schools approved private bus company list for field trips/activities
recent_news: Active Florida corporation (Sunbiz, last event a reinstatement filed 10/05/2023); no M&A activity located.
fit_notes: Independent small South Florida operator on M-DCPS approved vendor list. ~$1.6M revenue / ~36 employees suggests ~10-20 buses; could be a small bolt-on if Summit pursues a South Florida cluster, but limited public info on contracts or owners.

name: Yaeger Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Mankato Area Public Schools (Mankato, MN) - NOT Arkansas
recent_news: The only operating Yaeger Bus Service Inc (yaegerbus.com) is a 3rd-generation family-owned operator in Mankato, MN, serving Mankato schools since 1954; owners Chad and Cara Yaeger. The listed Springdale, AR address (2220 W Don Tyson Pkwy) is Tyson Foods HQ and is not a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Source record appears to have a state/address mismatch - the real Yaeger Bus Service is in Mankato, MN (a legitimate 3rd-gen family operator with succession potential), not Springdale, AR. The Arkansas record at the Tyson HQ address is not an operating school-bus company. If Summit is interested, target is the MN entity, not AR; succession angle (3rd gen, ~70 yrs old) could be attractive.

name: Tri-County Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Cranberry Township / Butler County / Pittsburgh north suburbs; specific districts not confirmed in public sources
recent_news: FMCSA USDOT 292426 / MC 188165 shows the carrier as INACTIVE in SAFER; no operating website found; not the same entity as Tri County Transportation (Northern Cambria, PA - Beacon Mobility platform).
fit_notes: Possibly dormant or scaled-down - FMCSA shows DOT 292426 as inactive and there is no live web presence. NOT the Beacon Mobility-owned Tri County Transportation. If still operating locally under PA PUC authority in the Cranberry/Butler area, ~44 employees would imply ~20-30 buses; succession-aged president could make it a tuck-in candidate, but needs direct outreach to confirm active status.
